body:
This is a revamp of #821 so it will supersede it. 
Unfortunately the original branch was so outdated (279 commits behind `main`) that rebasing it was a big headache. But credits for the original formulation go to @ilopezgp . I only reworked the interface to meet the reviewer's suggestions.


- [x] Code follows the [style guidelines](https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/DevDocs/CodeStyle/) OR N/A.
- [x] Unit tests are included OR N/A.
- [x] Code is exercised in an integration test OR N/A.
- [x] Documentation has been added/updated OR N/A.
title: Add truncated interval mesh utility
